title: MIXEL Beauty Makeup Toy For Kids, Compact & Portable, Fun And Safe, Fashion Styling, Arts & Crafts Stationery Set, Easy To Clean, Encourages Creativity & Role Play, Fun Toy for Girls
features: COMPACT & PORTABLE: Makeup Toy for Kids is lightweight and travel-friendly, making it the perfect companion for on-the-go fun. The compact unicorn-themed case ensures that all beauty and craft essentials are neatly stored, preventing mess and making it easy to carry anywhere. Ideal for vacations, sleepovers, and playdates. Keeps all items organized and ready for use .Designed for easy handling and play.

FUN & SAFE FOR KIDS: Beauty Makeup Toy for Kids is designed with safety and comfort in mind, ensuring a fun and worry-free play experience for children. Made from child-safe materials that won’t cause skin irritation. Effortlessly wipes off with water, ensuring a mess-free cleanup. Specially formulated for delicate and sensitive skin, making it safe for everyday play. With kid-friendly ingredients and washable formulas, this set allows children to explore creativity.

FASHION STYLING & ROLE PLAY: Makeup Toy for Kids is perfect for sparking imagination and creativity through fun role-playing activities. Kids can transform into little fashionistas, princesses, or makeup artists, fostering confidence and self-expression. Inspires kids to experiment with colors, styles, and looks, enhancing their artistic and fine motor skills. Engages young minds in playful and educational beauty activities, promoting hand-eye coordination and social skills.

ARTS & CRAFTS STATIONERY SET: Includes eye shadows, lip gloss, blush, and nail polish for stylish beauty makeovers. Features nail stickers, glitter, and accessories to create dazzling nail art designs. Adorable unicorn stationery and beauty tools add a magical touch to the set. Perfect for dress-up, pretend salon games and DIY fashion fun. Its lightweight design makes it easy to carry for on-the-go entertainment.

EASY TO CLEAN: Princess Beauty Makeup Toy is designed for safe and fun beauty play, featuring water-based, washable cosmetics for effortless removal. All cosmetics are easily removable with water, making cleanup hassle-free. Made from hypoallergenic, gentle formulas, perfect for young skin. Includes eye shadows, blush, lip gloss, and nail polish for a full makeover.
description: Product description Beauty Makeup Toy for Kids is a safe, fun, and engaging cosmetic set designed to encourage creativity, role play, and artistic expression. It allows young girls to explore beauty and fashion harmlessly and imaginatively, making it a perfect gift for birthdays, parties, and special occasions. Made from gentle, skin-safe materials to prevent irritation. Easily removable with water, requiring no harsh chemicals. Designed for easy application and quick cleanup, ensuring a stress-free experience. Features lip gloss, eye shadow, blush, and nail polish for a complete beauty experience. Comes with fun nail decorations, glittery stickers, and accessories to personalize their look. Perfect for makeovers, fashion games, and imaginative storytelling. Allows kids to experiment with colors, styles, and artistic looks. Encourages friendship and bonding during playdates, parties, and sleepovers. The portable design makes it perfect for on-the-go fun. Comes with a foldable, storage-friendly setup to keep everything neat and tidy. This fun and safe makeup set allows kids to explore beauty play in a creative, mess-free, and non-toxic way—making it a delightful gift for any young girl who loves fashion and makeup. Safety Warning Warning: Toy inside. Adult supervision recommended
